title: In /Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto, audit the repo for any remaining inconsistencies after moving X thumbnails to default textless/photoreal mode. Focus on docs, prompts, account_profile, and any scripts/configs that still assume text overlays by default. Return concrete findings with f...
summary_text: 1. **`account_profile` still encodes text-overlay-first thumbnail policy** - File: [account_profile.py](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/account_profile.py):18 - Finding: Rule `8.` says thumbnails should prioritize JP+EN coexisting text (`英語 headline + 日本語カテゴリ/補助ラベル`) and references `タイトルカード`, which conflicts with default `textless=1`. - Minimal fix: Rewrite that sentence to make `textless/photoreal` the default and explicitly mark bilingual text overlay as legacy/opt-in (`X_AUTO_THUMB_TEXTLESS=0` only). 2. **Main thumbnail prompt section in docs is still effectively text-overlay mandatory** - File: [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/CLAUDE.md):313 - Finding: The “3層プロンプト構造（Gemini / Manus 共通テンプレート）” says `文字のない画像は不可` and mandates main/sub copy rendering, despite default being textless. - Minimal fix: Split into two clearly labeled templates: `Default (textless)` and `Legacy (text overlay)`, and remove/relocate “文字なし不可” to legacy only. 3. **Multiple downstream doc sections still present text layout/copy workflow as default** - File: [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/CLAUDE.md):254 - Finding: Sections like `S→A→B→C` (`人物+コピー+CTA`), layout rules (`左3/5テキスト`), and copy-first 3-step workflow imply text overlay is primary behavior. - Minimal fix: Add explicit mode guards (`textless default` vs `text overlay legacy`) to these sections; for default mode, replace copy/layout requirements with motif/composition rules. 4. **Natural-language mode parser can unintentionally force text-overlay mode** - File: [scripts/generate-thumbnails.sh](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-thumbnails.sh):23 - Finding: `headline` keyword sets `textless=0`; command like `textless headline-free photoreal` resolves to text mode. I verified: output logged `textless=0`. - Minimal fix: Remove bare `headline` trigger, or only flip when matched as positive intent (`with headline`, `見出しあり`) and ignore negated forms (`headline-free`, `no headline`). 5. **Fallback template header comment is stale vs default behavior** - File: [scripts/thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js):8 - Finding: “Design principles” still foreground “Bold typography,” while default mode hides text blocks. - Minimal fix: Update header comments to state typography applies to legacy overlay mode only. Checked and consistent with new default: - [.env.example](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/.env.example):8 - [scripts/generate-images-nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-images-nb2.js):11 - [scripts/thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js):19 No files were edited.
